input.background: A sample of 3 units is drawn without replacement from a batch of 15 units, of which two are bad. Let X denote the number of bad units in the sample.
input.question: Determine the distribution function.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
output.answer:
(ii) The probability function of $X$ is

$$
F(x)= \begin{cases}0 & x<0 \\
\frac{22}{35} & 0 \leq x<1 \\
\frac{34}{35} & 1 \leq x<2 \\
1 & x \geq 2\end{cases}
$$

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
